codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

🏁 🍇
  💭 Connection settings
  🔤localhost🔤 ➡️ host
  3010 ➡️ port
  🔤/dnd5e/equip-item🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Query parameters
  🔤clientId=foundry-testing-r6bXhB7k9cXa3cif🔤 ➡️ clientId
  🔤?🧲clientId🧲🔤 ➡️ queryString

  💭 Request body
  🔤{"actorUuid":"Actor.4zp7DW9DaguOqWcZ","itemName":"Dart","equipped":true}🔤 ➡️ body

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤POST /dnd5e/equip-item🧲queryString🧲 HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3010❌r❌nx-api-key: 702fc3316ac88039ff83024cf3d44cb4❌r❌nContent-Type: application/json❌r❌nContent-Length: 72❌r❌n❌r❌n🧲body🧲🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
🍉

📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

🏁 🍇
  💭 Connection settings
  🔤localhost🔤 ➡️ host
  3010 ➡️ port
  🔤/dnd5e/transfer-currency🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Query parameters
  🔤clientId=foundry-testing-r6bXhB7k9cXa3cif🔤 ➡️ clientId
  🔤?🧲clientId🧲🔤 ➡️ queryString

  💭 Request body
  🔤{"sourceActorUuid":"Actor.4zp7DW9DaguOqWcZ","targetActorUuid":"Actor.IXHFdLwZhCMTTUxV","currency":{"gp":1}}🔤 ➡️ body

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤POST /dnd5e/transfer-currency🧲queryString🧲 HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3010❌r❌nx-api-key: 702fc3316ac88039ff83024cf3d44cb4❌r❌nContent-Type: application/json❌r❌nContent-Length: 107❌r❌n❌r❌n🧲body🧲🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
🍉
